pageContext.name: Frankenstein
pageContext.description: …by the dim and yellow light of the moon, as it forced its way through the window shutters, I beheld the wretch — the miserable monster whom I had created.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Frankenstein Fine Art Print, an original horror art print inspired by Mary Shelley's literary classic, as imagined by artist Mike Mahle.  In a monstrous blend of scientific fact and horrific fiction, Frankenstein introduced the world to a tragic yet terrifying figure in its monster. Rejected both by his creator and crowds of fearful villagers, Frankenstein's monster is a being of gruesome contrast; he represents both miraculous achievement and dreadful mistakes. In this vector art portrait, the pitiable creation looks from inside the dark charnel house of his creation towards a cemetery. He is shackled to death, built from it, and will someday return to its indifferent embrace.  Each Frankenstein Fine Art Print in the collaborative release with Sideshow features an authorized, automated artist signature in the lower region of the full bleed giclée image. Available unframed or in a custom framed presentation, this melancholy tribute to The Modern Prometheus belongs in human society — and namely, on your walls!  Give this creation a new life and bring home the Frankenstein Fine Art Print by Mike Mahle for your horror artwork collection today.
